task: Suggest structure and content for proposal.md according to OpenSpec standard
input_summary: Requirement: write a proposal for a stock trend forecasting system from news with faithfulness verification. Must include: background, objectives, technical challenges, roles, and timeline.
output_summary: Agent proposed a 9-section structure: background & motivation, research questions, objectives, technical challenges, agentic SDLC, expected outcomes, roles, timeline, references. Includes a comparison table of prediction accuracy vs explanation faithfulness.
notes: Revised the objectives section to clarify prototype scope; added specific NVDA/TSLA examples to the background. QG-03 passed after review by SV2 and SV3.

task: Create User Stories and Acceptance Criteria for specs/forecasting/spec.md
input_summary: Requirement: write ≥5 user stories in the format 'As a [role], I want [feature], So that [benefit]' for the forecasting system. Each story must have measurable acceptance criteria. Actors: Researcher, Reviewer, System.
output_summary: Agent created 6 user stories: Temporal Filtering, Evidence Extraction, Stock Forecasting, Faithfulness Evaluation, Dashboard Visualization, Agentic SDLC Traceability. Each story has 6-8 specific acceptance criteria with conditions and expected outcomes.
notes: Adjusted AC-04-06 from 0.05 threshold to 3-level classification (likely_faithful / uncertain / possibly_decorative). Added US-06 on agent trace after initial proposal. QG-03 passed.

task: Draft metric_definition.md with complete definitions, illustrative examples, and advanced metrics
input_summary: Requirement: write a document defining 3 basic metrics (Temporal Validity, Evidence Support, Confidence Drop) and 4 advanced metrics (Sufficiency, Counterfactual Drop, Counterevidence Coverage, Market Consistency). Must include mathematical formulas, concrete numerical examples, and edge cases.
output_summary: Agent prepared a comprehensive document: 4 basic metrics (A1-A4) with illustrative AAPL examples for each, 4 advanced metrics (B1-B4) with formulas and interpretations, an 8-metric summary table, and academic references.
notes: Added a summary table at the end. Added 'Interpretation when low' column to the summary table. Added an explanation of why faithfulness metrics are needed at the beginning of the document. QG-03 passed.

task: Generate sample_news_price.csv with leakage and counterevidence rows
input_summary: REQUIREMENT.md schema and edge case rules

task: Implement temporal retriever with leakage warnings
